candidate_llm_application: LLM weight fragment recovery: reassemble damaged checkpoint shards by pattern-matching weights; conservation algorithm co-evolves with checkpoint-degradation modes.

results.title: Checkpoint Reconstruction / Weight Stitching: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on checkpoint reconstruction / weight stitching, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (checkpoint reconstruction / weight stitching); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (silk-road-textile-conservation terms vs LLM terms).
